overall.description: A static first-person view from a futuristic luxury apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, focusing on a wall-mounted television displaying a news broadcast. The scene features modern interior furnishings and large windows revealing a futuristic cityscape outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living room with media center

agents.ego_description: stationary, watching the news broadcast on the television screen

low cabinet with metallic gold-colored doors beneath the television

keyboard with illuminated keys on the desk
scattered documents on the left side of the desk
flat electronic device on the left side of the desk
dark bowl or dish on the right side of the desk

floor-to-ceiling window showing exterior city view
distant futuristic buildings visible through the apartment windows

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed on a television displaying a news segment with two anchors discussing current events. The modern apartment features a glass desk with a keyboard and scattered papers, with floor-to-ceiling windows showing a futuristic cityscape in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living room with media center

segments.scene_description: The television broadcast transitions to show different news anchors while the room remains unchanged. The camera continues to focus on the TV from the same fixed position.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment living room with media center

segments.scene_description: The TV program changes to a formal press conference with a single speaker at a podium. The apartment setting remains static with the futuristic cityscape visible through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a fixed first-person perspective within a luxury apartment as the content of a wall-mounted television evolves through different news broadcasts. It begins focused on a news segment featuring two anchors, with a glass desk and a futuristic cityscape visible in the background. As the broadcast continues, the screen transitions to a different set of news anchors while the surrounding modern interior remains still. The scene then shifts one final time as the program changes to a formal press conference with a single speaker at a podium, all while the distant city skyline remains constant through the floor-to-ceiling windows.
